episodes.title: What I Read in February 📚 Steinbeck's East of Eden, Religious Cults, & Getting It On Again
episodes.description:
In this February reading wrap-up, I’m sharing my thoughts on the four books I finished this month. From a Hollywood memoir involving a religious cult to an atmospheric sapphic historical fiction, and a powerful American classic - February’s reading took me through a wide range of stories and emotions. In this video I talk about what each book is about, what I loved (and didn’t), and how they ranked for me by the end of the month.

Mans's Channel

08:36 The Safekeep by Yael van der Wouden
13:10 Love in the Time of Colic by Ian Kerner and Heidi Raykeil
19:26 East of Eden by John Steinbeck
23:45 SPOILERS for East of Eden
25:34 SPOILERS End for East of Eden

Other books mentioned:
She Comes First by Ian Kerner
Mating in Captivity by Esther Perel
Wuthering Heights by Emily Bronte
The Shards by Brett Easton Ellis

Thanks for being here!
